def normalize_username(username):
    # Correct: centralize normalization logic into a single reusable helper
    return username.strip().lower().replace(" ", "_")

def register_user(username):
    clean_name = normalize_username(username)
    db.save(clean_name)

def search_user(username):
    clean_name = normalize_username(username)
    return db.find(clean_name)
